description: Style NoteWorry no longer about managing money, cards and coins in your purse! Organise your everyday essentials into this stylish purse from baggit. This timeless piece is on the top of our wish-list this year. A sophisticated addition to your accessory collection, you can carry this piece over your shoulder or pop it into your bag.Product DetailsMaroon purse with a velvety feel from the outside that has a magnetic buttoned closure with an inner zipped pocket and two pockets on either sideOne pocket on the front with a magnetic buttoned closureStitch detailing in the frontBranding at the backOne zipped pocket at the backOne long handle for carrying easeMaterial and CareLeatherette, synthetic and blended fabricWipe with a clean damp cloth when necessarySize17 cm x 10 cm
